title: Taxi Safety Workshop
subtitle: Free self-defence class for commuters
description: Join us at the Johannesburg City Hall for a free safety workshop. Learn basic self-defence, emergency protocols, and meet fellow commuters.

title: Taxi Marshal Positions
subtitle: City of Johannesburg hiring
description: The City of Johannesburg is hiring 50 taxi marshals across major ranks. R6,500/month, benefits included. Apply before 28 Feb.

title: Bree Rank Delays
subtitle: Heavy congestion reported
description: Commuters report 30+ minute delays at Bree Taxi Rank due to road works on Albertina Sisulu Road. Consider alternative routes via MTN Noord.

title: Commuter Meet & Greet
subtitle: Build your taxi buddy network
description: Meet other daily commuters on your route! Organised by Haibo Fam at Sandton Gautrain Station. Refreshments provided.

title: Haibo Ambassador Programme
subtitle: Earn while you commute
description: Become a Haibo Ambassador! Share safety tips, report route info, and earn R500-R2,000/month. Perfect for daily commuters.

title: New Route: Midrand Express
subtitle: Direct service now available
description: New direct taxi service from Midrand to Sandton CBD launched today. R18 fare, 15 min ride. Departs from Midrand Taxi Rank every 10 minutes.

title: Women in Transit Forum
subtitle: Safety solutions for women commuters
description: A panel discussion on improving safety for women using public transport. Featuring transport officials, community leaders, and safety experts.
